business_question: Which promotions generated the greatest increase in sales volume?
business_context: Marketing teams need to evaluate which campaigns create the strongest sales impact.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.PROMOTION_NAME,
    SUM(f.PROMO_UNITS_SOLD) AS PROMO_UNITS,
    SUM(f.BASELINE_UNITS_SOLD) AS BASELINE_UNITS,
    ROUND(
        (
            SUM(f.PROMO_UNITS_SOLD) -
            SUM(f.BASELINE_UNITS_SOLD)
        ) * 100.0 /
        NULLIF(SUM(f.BASELINE_UNITS_SOLD),0),
        2
    ) AS SALES_LIFT_PCT
FROM FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE f
JOIN DIM_PROMOTION p
    ON f.PROMOTION_KEY = p.PROMOTION_KEY
GROUP BY p.PROMOTION_NAME
ORDER BY SALES_LIFT_PCT DESC;
